title: Lesson 30 (Vocab) - わあ, わんわん, んー...
description: わんわん is a dog barking. んー is the sound of thinking or saying "no."

items.gloss: wow!; oh!; eek!; gee!; yeah!; alright!; hurray!; waah!; boohoo!
bow-wow; woof; arf; barking; wah-wah; bawling; wailing; clamouring; clamoring; echoing; loudly; dog; doggy
hm; um; huh?; what?; nuh-uh; no
boo! (sound used to scare someone); ugh (dissatisfaction, aggravation); ulp (consternation)
